_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Ratcheted up as the score has climbed. break=97.5 (set at 98.19 / 100.00 covered after security VT base64url + serviceId pins reached 100% TOTAL, ollama finally-cleanup equivalent pragma — 100% COVERED across all 10 client modules + oauth, buffer 0.69). 3 files at 100% TOTAL: atlassian, security, types. The ratchet is non-decreasing.
